MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-10-2020 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JESUS TREVINO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE, BUT WAIVED DEFENDANT JESUS TRAVINO'S FIRST APPEARANCE FEE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR FEB-01-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUL-22-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK'S MOTION TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. PLAINTIFF'S MOTIONS TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $360 NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 21, 2020. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT REBECCA@GREYRESOLUTION.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: REBECCA GREY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Discovery Motion And Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-24-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK's Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions.

Plaintiff's Motions to Deem Matters Admitted and for Monetary Sanctions are GRANTED. Defendant shall pay sanctions in the amount of $360 no later than October 21, 2020.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at rebecca@greyresolution.com

Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Grey, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
